commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And I brought them into the house of the LORD, into the chamber of the sons of Hanan, the son of Igdaliah, a man of God, who was by the chamber of the princes, which was above the chamber of Maaseiah the son of Shallum, the keeper of the door: Of God. Prophets are generally thus designated, 4 Kings iv. We know nothing more of this holy man. Princes of the priests; or where princes made their offerings, or assembled to judge, chap. He was not removeable like the other Levites, 1 Paralipomenon ix.
